ModName: GBFR Extra Sigil Slots - Reloaded ImGui (ER 2.0.2)
ModDescription: Reloaded-II-only configurable extra-sigil selector for ER 2.0.2 with 1-24 virtual slots, named multi-character presets, usage filters and safe ownership transfer, a compact bilingual UI, Chinese IME support, localized character names, and a Reloaded-II configurable hotkey (F8 by default). No ReShade or Luma dependency.
